_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

claim.label: Post procedure stills of ECHO with report

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure
Was the Echo/ Doppler report suggestive of two valve pathology?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Procedure / Operative notes submitted?
Does the Post procedure still of ECHO show repair/ replacement of both the valves?
Is there a Detailed Discharge Summary mentioning date of follow-up submitted?
Is the barcode of implant/ valve/ ring used submitted?

common_queries: Echo/Doppler report not suggestive of two valve pathology
Clinical notes (detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure) missing or inadequate at pre-authorization
Procedure/Operative notes not submitted at claim stage
Post procedure ECHO stills/report missing or not showing repair/replacement of both valves at claim stage
Barcode of implant not submitted at claim stage, despite implant being used

clinical_key_pointers: For Clinical Pointers, refer to individual valve Guidance document/ Standard Treatment Guideline.
